jobs.justification: O candidato possui todas as habilidades e experiências chave exigidas para a vaga de Product Manager - AI Agents na Assembled. Ele tem aproximadamente 3-4 anos de experiência em gestão de produto e programa em ambientes de tecnologia em rápido crescimento, incluindo papéis relevantes no Instituto Atlântico e no Nubank. Além disso, ele tem experiência prática em integrar IA/GenAI em produtos, incluindo a aplicação de uma metodologia estruturada para avaliação de sistemas de IA. O candidato também demonstra habilidades sólidas em liderança de equipes multifuncionais, alinhamento de stakeholders e entrega de produtos. Seu perfil se alinha muito bem com os requisitos centrais da vaga.
jobs.main_gap: Não há gaps significativos no perfil do candidato em relação aos requisitos da vaga.

jobs.justification: O candidato Guilherme Maia possui um perfil altamente qualificado para a vaga de Technical Project Manager I na empresa dv01. Ele tem uma sólida experiência de ~3-4 anos em cargos de gestão de projetos e programas (PM, TPM, PO) na área de tecnologia, incluindo trabalhos relevantes em fintech e empresas de IA. Suas habilidades técnicas, de liderança e de entrega de projetos complexos estão bem alinhadas com os requisitos da vaga, conforme evidenciado em seu histórico profissional. Além disso, ele possui um diferencial em IA, o que é um ativo importante para essa posição. O único ponto a ser considerado é que a vaga menciona 1-3 anos de experiência, enquanto o candidato possui ~3-4 anos, mas isso não é um gap significativo. Portanto, atribuo um score de 92 para essa candidatura.
jobs.main_gap: Nenhum gap significativo identificado, o perfil do candidato se alinha muito bem com os requisitos da vaga.

core_requirements.requirement: Gerenciar o ciclo de vida completo do produto, desde a concepção, desenvolvimento, lançamento até o acompanhamento pós-lançamento.
core_requirements.evidence: Experiência em gerenciar ciclo de vida de produtos de dados e tecnológicos complexos, com foco em resultados mensuráveis

core_requirements.requirement: Realizar análises de mercado e benchmarking para identificar boas práticas, oportunidades e tendências que possam ser incorporadas ao produto.
core_requirements.evidence: Habilidade comprovada em realizar pesquisas de mercado, benchmarking e análise de dados para embasar decisões

core_requirements.requirement: Construir e manter relacionamentos sólidos com stakeholders internos, como engenheiros de dados, cientistas de dados e áreas de negócio, garantindo alinhamento e colaboração.
core_requirements.evidence: Experiência em liderar equipes multidisciplinares e construir relacionamentos colaborativos com diferentes áreas

core_requirements.requirement: Definir, monitorar e garantir o atingimento de metas e KPIs que reflitam o sucesso do produto e os objetivos de negócio.
core_requirements.evidence: Histórico de definir, monitorar e atingir metas e KPIs que refletem o sucesso de produtos e objetivos de negócio

seniority_comparison.candidate_has: ~3-4 anos em papéis PM/TPM em tecnologia

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato Guilherme Maia possui um perfil altamente qualificado para a vaga de Technical Project Manager I na empresa dv01. Ele tem uma sólida experiência de ~3-4 anos em cargos de gestão de projetos e programas (PM, TPM, PO) na área de tecnologia, incluindo trabalhos relevantes em fintech e empresas de IA. Suas habilidades técnicas, de liderança e de entrega de projetos complexos estão bem alinhadas com os requisitos da vaga, conforme evidenciado em seu histórico profissional. Além disso, ele possui um diferencial em IA, o que é um ativo importante para essa posição. O único ponto a ser considerado é que a vaga menciona 1-3 anos de experiência, enquanto o candidato possui ~3-4 anos, mas isso não é um gap significativo. Portanto, atribuo um score de 92 para essa candidatura.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Nenhum gap significativo identificado, o perfil do candidato se alinha muito bem com os requisitos da vaga.
scored_jobs.title: Technical Project Manager I

core_requirements.requirement: Manage all lifecycle stages for a project post ideation with responsibility for ensuring that deliverables are understood and releases are delivered on time
core_requirements.evidence: Extensive experience as a PM, TPM and PO managing projects and programs from ideation to delivery, including responsibility for defining success metrics, aligning stakeholders, and delivering on time (see 'Experiências Chave')

core_requirements.requirement: Partner with engineering teams to help translate technical requirements and system dependencies into actionable project plans, ensuring workstreams stay aligned and progress is clearly communicated across teams
core_requirements.evidence: Experience working closely with engineering teams to align technical requirements, dependencies, and project plans, ensuring cross-functional collaboration and clear communication (see 'Experiências Chave' and 'Skills Principais')

core_requirements.requirement: Leverage AI-powered tools to improve project coordination, including synthesizing updates, generating documentation, and helping surface risks or dependencies across technical workstreams to support more efficient execution
core_requirements.evidence: Demonstrated experience in applying AI/ML technologies to improve project management, including documentation, risk identification, and process optimization (see 'Diferencial em IA' and 'Experiências Chave')

core_requirements.requirement: Connect the dots of complex workflows in a fast-paced environment. You will be responsible for engaging key stakeholders across business, technology, and product while working closely with software engineers to build consensus, resolve conflicts, and ensure smooth execution
core_requirements.evidence: Strong track record in managing complex, cross-functional projects and programs, navigating stakeholder alignment, conflict resolution, and ensuring smooth delivery in fast-paced environments (see 'Experiências Chave')

core_requirements.requirement: Ensure the quality of project deliverables. You will work with all stakeholders to establish quality standards and monitor adherence to quality in day-to-day execution
core_requirements.evidence: Experience in defining and monitoring quality standards, working closely with stakeholders to ensure adherence and high-quality project deliverables (see 'Experiências Chave')

seniority_comparison.jd_asks: 1-3 years of work experience successfully managing the launch of projects from end to end

scored_jobs.justification: O perfil de Guilherme é bastante alinhado com os requisitos do cargo de Agile Delivery Manager, com experiência relevante em papéis de gestão de produto, programa e projeto. Ele demonstra habilidades sólidas em liderança, entrega digital e resolução de problemas em ambientes complexos. No entanto, sua experiência em PM/TPM de aproximadamente 3-4 anos fica um pouco abaixo do esperado para este cargo, que normalmente requer 4-5 anos de senioridade. Portanto, a candidatura merece um score alto, mas com uma penalidade leve devido ao gap de senioridade.
scored_jobs.main_gap: Gap de 1 ano na senioridade esperada para este cargo de Agile Delivery Manager
scored_jobs.title: Group Agile Delivery Manager

core_requirements.requirement: Experience managing complex, cross-team programmes and initiatives
core_requirements.evidence: Extensive experience in TPM (Technical Program Manager) and PM (Project Manager) roles at the Institute Atlântico, leading complex global programs with multiple teams and stakeholders

core_requirements.requirement: Background delivering digital products and services across the full lifecycle from idea to optimisation
core_requirements.evidence: Significant experience as a PO (Product Owner) and PM focused on digital product delivery and optimization, including work on image scanning, startups, and IA integration

core_requirements.requirement: Ability to lead and influence without direct line authority
core_requirements.evidence: Demonstrated ability to lead through influence, clarity, and credibility, as evidenced by the PO, PM, and TPM roles where Guilherme led cross-functional teams and stakeholders without direct line management

core_requirements.requirement: Confidence in identifying and resolving delivery problems within teams or systems
core_requirements.evidence: Strong track record of identifying and resolving delivery problems, as shown by the improvements made during the TPM role, such as reducing weekly review time from 40 to 10 minutes through internal automation

core_requirements.requirement: Ability to create structure in ambiguous environments
core_requirements.evidence: Guilherme's background demonstrates the ability to bring structure and clarity to ambiguous environments, as evidenced by his work as a PO, PM, and TPM, including the reorganization of a component-based system into a product-based one

seniority_comparison.jd_asks: Experience managing complex, cross-team programmes and initiatives

scored_jobs.justification: O candidato possui uma sólida experiência em papéis de gestão de produto e programa, incluindo atuação em iniciativas envolvendo IA. Sua familiaridade com metodologias ágeis, liderança de equipes, análise de dados e práticas de governança para IA o tornam um bom candidato para a vaga de Program Manager AI Programs da Airtable. No entanto, a lacuna está no conhecimento mais aprofundado da plataforma Airtable e suas aplicações verticais, o que pode demandar um período de adaptação e rampup.

Conhecimento prático em metodologia de IA, incluindo governança humano-IA, avaliação por critérios e decomposição em pipelines especializados.

core_requirements.evidence: Experiência em gestão de comunidades e programas voltados para diferentes grupos-alvo, como startups, aceleradoras e estudantes.

core_requirements.evidence: Experiência em apresentações, facilitação de workshops e programas de capacitação, incluindo habilidades de comunicação e simplificação de conceitos complexos.

eliminated_jobs.title: Consultant, Senior (EPM)
eliminated_jobs.jd_full:
General information

Country United States City Remote Location Job ID 48310 Department Infor Consulting Services Experience Level MID_SENIOR_LEVEL Employment Status FULL_TIME Workplace Type Remote

Description & Requirements

Infor is seeking an experienced and analytical EPM (Enterprise Performance Management Consultant) to support customers in designing, implementing, and optimizing Infor EPM solutions. This role blends financial expertise with hands-on implementation work and requires practiced FP&A fundamentals, budgeting leadership, consolidation experience, and the ability to work directly with customers to deliver high quality EPM outcomes.
A Day in the Life Typically Includes:

  • Lead or support end to end budgeting and forecasting solution design within Infor EPM Budgeting & Planning.
  • Develop and refine complex financial models using Excel and Infor EPM Modeling Services.
  • Support multinational financial consolidation using Infor EPM Financial Consolidation, including intercompany eliminations, ownership structures, and consolidation logic.
  • Configure and deploy EPM components using the Infor EPM Platform.
  • Facilitate requirements gathering, solution design, functional specifications, testing, validation, and customer enablement.
  • Deliver customer training on Budgeting, Planning, Consolidation, Reporting, and other EPM components.

Basic Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance.
  • Experience in FP&A, including financial modeling, planning cycles, and reporting.
  • Experience leading the budget process and planning forecasting for multiple business units within the organization.
  • Manufacturing or multi-industry FP&A experience.
  • Experience with multinational financial consolidation, preferably using a dedicated tool.
  • Proficiency building complex financial models in Excel or planning technologies.
  • Experience in gathering and translating business requirements.
  • Consulting or customer-facing implementation experience.
  • Legal authorization to work permanently in the United States for any employer without requiring a visa transfer or sponsorship now or in the future.
  • Ability to travel up to 50% throughout North America (US and Canada), based on project needs.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Corporate accounting experience.
  • Hands-on experience with any EPM application. (e.g EPM Budgeting & Planning, EPM Financial Consolidation, Self-Service Reporting)
  • Experience implementing or supporting other EPM solutions (Hyperion, Cognos, TM1, Anaplan, OneStream, Adaptive, etc.).

Remote (Dallas, TX, Atlanta, GA)
About Infor
Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn’t just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you’re not just building a career. you’re helping to build what’s next.
Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business-wide digital transformation.
For more information visit www.infor.com
Our Values
At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship & compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self-actualization.
We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.
Infor is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. Infor does not discriminate against candidates or employees because of their sex, race, gender identity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, veteran status, or any other protected status under the law. If you require accommodation or assistance at any time during the application or selection processes, please submit a request by following the directions located in the FAQ section.
Fraud Awareness
We have been made aware of unauthorized individuals posing as Infor recruiters, including some who have made fraudulent offers of employment. Please read our guidelines and protect yourself from recruitment scams.
Fraud Privacy Policy
We value your privacy at Infor. You may access our privacy policy here.

This employer uses E-Verify. Please visit this website for additional information.

E-Verify Illinois: Click here, aquí, or tu.

eliminated_jobs.title: Sr. Environmental Project Manager &#8211; PFAS
eliminated_jobs.jd_full:
Job Overview:

APTIM, a full-service multidiscipline environmental and engineering consulting firm, is currently seeking an experienced, goal-oriented PFAS Project Director/Manager with proven marketing skills to continue to expand and drive our growth in the remediation of constituents impacted by PFAS and other Emerging Contaminants. The qualified candidate will collaborate with our in-house Subject Matter Experts across our various Business Lines and Business Units to foster growth and collaboration as we seek to further leverage our PFAS expertise on existing contracts as well as to generate new opportunities with both Federal and Private-sector clients, including but not limited to airports, manufacturers, and drinking water purveyors. The successful candidate will be highly motivated with demonstrated experience and a successful track record of driving market growth in PFAS-related pursuits. Office/Geographic location is flexible.

Key Responsibilities/Accountabilities:

  • Function as seller-doer, develops and maintains long-lasting and meaningful relationships with clients and industry teaming partners
  • Possess a solid understanding of PFAS regulatory trends and commercial client strategies for risk management, and how to convert such trends into business opportunities
  • Utilize knowledge and work experience to develop business development strategies to meet client needs
  • Support Program and Capture Managers with Task Order bids; lead captures for PFAS pursuits
  • Ability to understand and communicate risks to leadership and within project execution teams
  • Experience in tracking and capitalizing on federal funding as related to PFAS-related opportunities
  • Effectively communicate APTIM’s technical prowess in the remediation of PFAS-impacted constituents to stakeholders, including representation of the company at conferences, workshops, and other professional forums

Basic Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree or Master’s degree in a scientific or engineering discipline
  • Minimum of 15 years’ of progressively more responsible Program or Project Management level experience, including 3 years in a business development or similar role
  • Has in-depth functional expertise and broad business knowledge related to PFAS
  • Proven track record of client marketing and development on PFAS/Emerging Contaminant related projects
  • Well-developed interpersonal and communication skills (verbal, written, proposal and presentation)
  • Experienced in proposal development and management (scope, budget, schedule).
  • Self-starter with strong cognitive problem-solving abilities
  • Professional registration/certification/licensure as relevant to degree or discipline preferred

About APTIM

APTIM enhances the quality of the environment, wellbeing of people, resilience of communities, and opportunity for employees to make a difference, not just a living. A leading professional solutions firm, we specialize in environmental, sustainability, resilience, and infrastructure solutions. Our team of experts provide these integrated solutions for forward-thinking government agencies, commercial and industrial clients, and energy customers. Together, we create sustainable and resilient communities for all.

What you can expect from APTIM:

  • Work that is worthy of your time and talent
  • Respect and flexibility to live a full life at work and at home
  • Dogged determination to deliver for our clients and communities
  • A voice in making our company better
  • Investment into your personal and professional development

As of the date of this posting, a good faith estimate of the current pay range for this position is $150K to $175K yearly. Compensation depends on several factors including: experience, education, key skills, geographic location of the position, client requirements, external market competitiveness, and internal equity among other employees within APTIM.

Employee Benefits

APTIM Environmental & Infrastructure LLC, is committed to providing an extensive range of benefits that protect and promote the health and financial well-being of our employees and their families through the APTIM Benefits Marketplace https://aptim.makeityoursource.com/.

  • Medical, vision, and dental insurance: Through the marketplace, our employees can choose benefits from five metallic levels and 10+ carriers to find the right benefits that work for them in their location.
  • Life insurance
  • Short-term and long-term disability insurance
  • Paid holidays, vacation, and sick leave (eligibility based on company policy and applicable law)
  • 401(k) APTIM offers three 401k plans through the Aon Pooled Employer Plan (PEP). The specific plan you are eligible for depends on the business unit you are in. The details of the largest plan are found here:
    • APTIM 401(k) Guide
    • APTIM – Helpful Documents

Watch our video:
About APTIM – In Pursuit of Better
